name: codex-agent-loop
description: Bounded, resumable OpenAI-native coding loops for Codex with installer, doctor, demo, shorthand budgets, shell, and apply_patch support.

interface.shortDescription: Run bounded Claude-Code-style coding loops with doctor, demo, shorthand budgets, shell, and approval pauses.
interface.longDescription: Codex Agent Loop adds a reusable command and skill for running bounded, resumable OpenAI-native coding loops. It includes a one-command installer, a doctor command for setup checks, a first-run demo, shorthand budgets like 10m and 5t, local run logs, and approval pauses before writes.
defaultPrompt: Run the onboarding demo for Codex Agent Loop.
Diagnose my Codex Agent Loop setup with doctor.
Run an agent loop for 10 minutes on this coding task.
Run an agent loop on this coding task with an 8-turn cap.
Iterate until the bug is fixed, but pause before write actions.
Resume the last paused coding loop and approve the pending patch.
